name: Invoice number
definition: An invoice shall have an invoice number.
definition_local: Unique identifier for each invoice. This ID may need to be created by concatenating fields such as document number, document type, and year to uniquely identify each transaction. The same ID must be used for all tables with invoice data.

name: Invoice number
definition: An invoice shall have an invoice number.
definition_local: Identification number for an externally generated invoice.

name: Invoice issue date
definition: The date when the invoice was issued.
definition_local: The date of the invoice, regardless of the date the invoice is entered. This is the date from which the due date is calculated based on the invoice terms.

name: Invoice issue date
definition: The date when the invoice was issued.
definition_local: Fiscal year in which the Invoice_Date occurs.

name: Invoice issue date
definition: The date when the invoice was issued.
definition_local: Fiscal period in which the Invoice_Date occurs.

name: Payment due date
definition: The date when the payment is due.
definition_local: The date payment is due to the supplier. Not all transactions will have a due date. Aging of a payable is usually calculated based on this date.

name: Purchase order reference
definition: An identifier of a referenced purchase order, issued by the Buyer.
definition_local: Unique identifier for each purchase order. Must match Purchase_Order_ID in the Purchase_Orders file. If no purchase order, leave blank.

name: Buyer accounting reference
definition: A textual value that specifies where to book the relevant data into the Buyer's financial accounts.
definition_local: Used to identify the business unit, region, branch, and so on at the level that financial statements are being audited. Must match the Business_Unit_Code in the Business_Unit_Listing file.

name: Seller identifier
definition: The identification scheme identifier of the Seller identifier. An identifier issued by an official
definition_local: Identifier of the supplier to whom payment is due or from whom unused credits have been applied. Must match the Supplier_Account_ID in the Supplier_Listing file.

name: Payment terms
definition: A textual description of the payment terms that apply to the amount due for payment (Including description of possible penalties). A group of business terms providing
definition_local: The discount percentage the supplier may provide if an invoice is paid before a certain number of days.

name: Invoice total amount with VAT
definition_local: Transaction monetary amount recorded in the functional or group currency.

name: Document currency code
definition: The currency in which all Invoice amounts are given, except for the Total VAT amount in accounting currency.
definition_local: The functional or group currency related to the invoice amount. See ISO 4217 coding.

name: VAT category code
definition_local: Code for Tax1 type, such as Sales or VAT. This field should agree with the Regulator_Code field in the Tax_Table.

name: VAT exemption reason text
definition: why the amount is exempted from VAT or why no VAT is being charged A coded statement of the reason for why the amount is exempted from
definition_local: Description of Tax1 type, such as the authority tax is paid to and other information to identify tax.

name: VAT category tax amount
definition_local: The amount of Tax1_Type included in the transaction. Recorded in local currency.

name: Buyer accounting reference
definition: A textual value that specifies where to book the relevant data into the Buyer's financial accounts.
definition_local: Reserved segment field that can be used for profit center, division, fund, program, branch, project, and so on.
